analects.notes: Teachings of Confucius assembled by students and later editors

socrates_corpus.notes: Socrates wrote no books; known through Plato, Xenophon, and others

mencius.notes: Attributed to Mencius (孟子, Meng Ke); compiled and edited across Warring States and Han

zhuangzi.notes: Core chapters linked to Zhuang Zhou; outer chapters likely later additions

symposium.notes: Platonic dialogue; Socrates is a character, not the author

enchiridion.notes: Arrian compiled teachings of Epictetus; not Plato or Socrates

apology.notes: Plato's dialogue; Socrates speaks but did not author the text

don_quixote.provenance: Universally attributed to Miguel de Cervantes; published in two parts, 1605 and 1615.

paradise_lost.provenance: Epic poem published by John Milton in 1667 (revised 1674); authorship is settled.

the_divine_comedy.provenance: Composed by Dante Alighieri c.1308-1320; authorship universally established.

hamlet.provenance: Tragedy by William Shakespeare, written c.1600; first printed 1603/1604.

macbeth.provenance: Tragedy by William Shakespeare, c.1606; printed in the First Folio (1623).

pride_and_prejudice.provenance: Novel by Jane Austen, published 1813; authorship is settled.

war_and_peace.provenance: Novel by Leo Tolstoy, serialized and published 1865-1869.

the_brothers_karamazov.provenance: Final novel of Fyodor Dostoevsky, published 1880.

the_hunchback_of_notre_dame.provenance: Novel by Victor Hugo, published 1831 (Notre-Dame de Paris).

the_count_of_monte_cristo.provenance: Novel by Alexandre Dumas (with collaborator Auguste Maquet), serialized 1844-1846.

faust.provenance: Dramatic poem by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe; Part One 1808, Part Two 1832.

the_sorrows_of_young_werther.provenance: Epistolary novel by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, published 1774.

don_juan.provenance: Satirical epic poem by Lord Byron (George Gordon), published 1819-1824.

jane_eyre.provenance: Novel by Charlotte Brontë, published 1847 under the pen name Currer Bell.

wuthering_heights.provenance: Sole novel of Emily Brontë, published 1847 under the pen name Ellis Bell.

adventures_of_huckleberry_finn.provenance: Novel published 1884-1885 by Samuel Clemens under his well-known pen name Mark Twain.

the_trial.provenance: Novel by Franz Kafka, written 1914-1915, published posthumously 1925.

in_search_of_lost_time.provenance: Novel sequence by Marcel Proust, published 1913-1927.

one_hundred_years_of_solitude.provenance: Novel by Gabriel García Márquez, published 1967.

decameron.provenance: Collection of novellas by Giovanni Boccaccio, composed c.1349-1353.

the_canterbury_tales.provenance: Collection of stories by Geoffrey Chaucer, composed c.1387-1400.

gulliver_s_travels.provenance: Satirical novel by Jonathan Swift, published 1726.

dream_of_the_red_chamber.provenance: Novel by Cao Xueqin, composed mid-18th century (later chapters edited by Gao E).

romance_of_the_three_kingdoms.provenance: Historical novel traditionally attributed to Luo Guanzhong, 14th century.

journey_to_the_west.provenance: Novel conventionally attributed to Wu Cheng'en, 16th century (Ming dynasty).

water_margin.provenance: Novel traditionally attributed to Shi Nai'an, 14th century.

the_tale_of_genji.provenance: Novel by Murasaki Shikibu, composed early 11th century.

shahnameh.provenance: Persian epic completed by Ferdowsi c.1010 CE.

masnavi.provenance: Sufi poem by Jalal al-Din Rumi, composed 13th century.

rubaiyat_of_omar_khayyam.provenance: Quatrains traditionally attributed to Omar Khayyam, 11th-12th century.

muqaddimah.provenance: Introduction to history by Ibn Khaldun, completed 1377.

the_prince.provenance: Political treatise by Niccolò Machiavelli, written 1513, published 1532.

leviathan.provenance: Political philosophy by Thomas Hobbes, published 1651.

two_treatises_of_government.provenance: Political work by John Locke, published 1689.

discourse_on_the_method.provenance: Philosophical work by René Descartes, published 1637.

ethics.provenance: Philosophical treatise by Baruch Spinoza, published posthumously 1677.

critique_of_pure_reason.provenance: Philosophical work by Immanuel Kant, first edition 1781.

an_enquiry_concerning_human_understandin.provenance: Philosophical work by David Hume, published 1748.

the_wealth_of_nations.provenance: Treatise on political economy by Adam Smith, published 1776.

das_kapital.provenance: Work of political economy by Karl Marx; Volume I published 1867.

thus_spoke_zarathustra.provenance: Philosophical work by Friedrich Nietzsche, published 1883-1885.

the_world_as_will_and_representation.canonicalTitleEn: The World as Will and Representation
the_world_as_will_and_representation.provenance: Philosophical work by Arthur Schopenhauer, published 1818-1819.

on_the_origin_of_species.provenance: Scientific work by Charles Darwin, published 1859.

philosophiae_naturalis_principia_mathema.provenance: Foundational physics treatise by Isaac Newton, published 1687.

dialogue_concerning_the_two_chief_world_.canonicalTitleEn: Dialogue Concerning the Two Chief World Systems
dialogue_concerning_the_two_chief_world_.provenance: Scientific work by Galileo Galilei, published 1632.

on_the_revolutions_of_the_heavenly_spher.canonicalTitleEn: On the Revolutions of the Heavenly Spheres
on_the_revolutions_of_the_heavenly_spher.provenance: Astronomical work by Nicolaus Copernicus, published 1543.

relativity_the_special_and_the_general_t.canonicalTitleEn: Relativity: The Special and the General Theory
relativity_the_special_and_the_general_t.provenance: Popular exposition by Albert Einstein, published 1916.

the_interpretation_of_dreams.provenance: Psychological work by Sigmund Freud, published 1899 (dated 1900).

candide.provenance: Satirical novella published 1759 by François-Marie Arouet under his pen name Voltaire.

the_social_contract.provenance: Political philosophy by Jean-Jacques Rousseau, published 1762.

the_spirit_of_the_laws.provenance: Treatise on political and legal theory by Montesquieu, published 1748.

commentaries_on_the_laws_of_england.canonicalTitleEn: Commentaries on the Laws of England
commentaries_on_the_laws_of_england.provenance: Treatise on English common law by William Blackstone, published 1765-1769.

the_history_of_the_decline_and_fall_of_t.canonicalTitleEn: The History of the Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire

the_histories.provenance: Historical work by Herodotus of Halicarnassus, 5th century BCE.

history_of_the_peloponnesian_war.provenance: Historical work by Thucydides, late 5th century BCE.

oedipus_rex.provenance: Tragedy by Sophocles, performed c.429 BCE.

medea.provenance: Tragedy by Euripides, first produced 431 BCE.

metamorphoses.provenance: Narrative poem by Ovid (Publius Ovidius Naso), completed c.8 CE.

novum_organum.provenance: Philosophical work by Francis Bacon, published 1620.

summa_theologica.provenance: Theological work by Thomas Aquinas, composed 1265-1274 (left unfinished).

confessions.provenance: Autobiographical work by Augustine of Hippo, composed c.397-400 CE.

the_great_gatsby.provenance: Novel by F. Scott Fitzgerald, published 1925; authorship is settled.

the_old_man_and_the_sea.canonicalTitleEn: The Old Man and the Sea

nausea.provenance: Novel by Jean-Paul Sartre, published 1938 (La Nausée).

the_metamorphosis.provenance: Novella by Franz Kafka, published 1915 (Die Verwandlung).

the_magic_mountain.provenance: Novel by Thomas Mann, published 1924 (Der Zauberberg).

steppenwolf.provenance: Novel by Hermann Hesse, published 1927 (Der Steppenwolf).

the_catcher_in_the_rye.provenance: Novel by J. D. Salinger, published 1951.

ficciones.provenance: Short-story collection by Jorge Luis Borges, published 1944.

the_tin_drum.provenance: Novel by Günter Grass, published 1959 (Die Blechtrommel).

the_leopard.provenance: Novel by Giuseppe Tomasi di Lampedusa, published posthumously 1958 (Il Gattopardo).

the_name_of_the_rose.provenance: Novel by Umberto Eco, published 1980 (Il nome della rosa).

snow_country.provenance: Novel by Yasunari Kawabata, serialized 1935-1937, completed 1948 (Yukiguni).

season_of_migration_to_the_north.canonicalTitleEn: Season of Migration to the North
season_of_migration_to_the_north.provenance: Novel by Tayeb Salih, published 1966 (Mawsim al-Hijra ila al-Shamal).

the_cairo_trilogy.provenance: Novel trilogy by Naguib Mahfouz, published 1956-1957.

the_master_and_margarita.provenance: Novel by Mikhail Bulgakov, written 1928-1940, published 1966-1967.

one_day_in_the_life_of_ivan_denisovich.canonicalTitleEn: One Day in the Life of Ivan Denisovich

eugene_onegin.provenance: Novel in verse by Alexander Pushkin, published 1825-1832.

leaves_of_grass.provenance: Poetry collection by Walt Whitman, first published 1855 and expanded through 1892.

the_waste_land.provenance: Poem by T. S. Eliot, published 1922.

duino_elegies.provenance: Poetry cycle by Rainer Maria Rilke, completed 1922, published 1923 (Duineser Elegien).

the_flowers_of_evil.provenance: Poetry collection by Charles Baudelaire, published 1857 (Les Fleurs du mal).

the_divan_of_hafez.provenance: Collected ghazals of Hafez of Shiraz, 14th century.

shakespeares_sonnets.provenance: Sequence of 154 sonnets by William Shakespeare, published 1609.

the_faerie_queene.provenance: Epic poem by Edmund Spenser, published 1590-1596.

the_rime_of_the_ancient_mariner.canonicalTitleEn: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner
the_rime_of_the_ancient_mariner.provenance: Poem by Samuel Taylor Coleridge, published 1798.

a_dolls_house.provenance: Play by Henrik Ibsen, premiered 1879 (Et dukkehjem).

the_cherry_orchard.provenance: Play by Anton Chekhov, premiered 1904 (Vishnyovy sad).

waiting_for_godot.provenance: Play by Samuel Beckett, premiered 1953 (En attendant Godot).

pygmalion.provenance: Play by George Bernard Shaw, premiered 1913.

the_blood_wedding.provenance: Play by Federico García Lorca, premiered 1933 (Bodas de sangre).

tartuffe.provenance: Comedy first performed 1664 by Jean-Baptiste Poquelin under his stage name Molière.

general_theory_of_employment_interest_an.canonicalTitleEn: The General Theory of Employment, Interest and Money
general_theory_of_employment_interest_an.provenance: Economics treatise by John Maynard Keynes, published 1936.

principles_of_political_economy_and_taxa.canonicalTitleEn: On the Principles of Political Economy and Taxation
principles_of_political_economy_and_taxa.provenance: Economics treatise by David Ricardo, published 1817.

the_structure_of_scientific_revolutions.provenance: Work in philosophy of science by Thomas Kuhn, published 1962.

tractatus_logico_philosophicus.provenance: Philosophical work by Ludwig Wittgenstein, published 1921.

being_and_time.provenance: Philosophical work by Martin Heidegger, published 1927 (Sein und Zeit).

the_second_sex.provenance: Philosophical work by Simone de Beauvoir, published 1949 (Le Deuxième Sexe).

a_theory_of_justice.provenance: Work in political philosophy by John Rawls, published 1971.

the_elements.provenance: Mathematical treatise by Euclid of Alexandria, c.300 BCE.

almagest.provenance: Astronomical treatise by Claudius Ptolemy, 2nd century CE.

on_the_fabric_of_the_human_body.canonicalTitleEn: On the Fabric of the Human Body
on_the_fabric_of_the_human_body.provenance: Anatomical treatise by Andreas Vesalius, published 1543 (De humani corporis fabrica).

the_selfish_gene.provenance: Popular science book by Richard Dawkins, published 1976.

silent_spring.provenance: Environmental science book by Rachel Carson, published 1962.

a_brief_history_of_time.provenance: Popular science book by Stephen Hawking, published 1988.

godel_escher_bach.canonicalTitleEn: Gödel, Escher, Bach: an Eternal Golden Braid

principia_mathematica_whitehead_russell.provenance: Foundational logic work co-authored by Alfred North Whitehead and Bertrand Russell, published 1910-1913.

democracy_in_america.provenance: Political study by Alexis de Tocqueville, published 1835-1840 (De la démocratie en Amérique).

reflections_on_the_revolution_in_france.canonicalTitleEn: Reflections on the Revolution in France
reflections_on_the_revolution_in_france.provenance: Political treatise by Edmund Burke, published 1790.

common_sense.provenance: Pamphlet by Thomas Paine advocating American independence, published 1776.

the_gallic_wars.provenance: Firsthand military account by Julius Caesar, written c.58-49 BCE (Commentarii de Bello Gallico).

the_book_of_optics.provenance: Optics treatise by Ibn al-Haytham (Alhazen), composed c.1011-1021 (Kitab al-Manazir).

the_canon_of_medicine.provenance: Medical encyclopedia by Ibn Sina (Avicenna), completed 1025 (al-Qanun fi al-Tibb).

the_compendious_book_on_calculation_by_c.canonicalTitleEn: The Compendious Book on Calculation by Completion and Balancing
the_compendious_book_on_calculation_by_c.provenance: Foundational algebra treatise by al-Khwarizmi, c.820 CE.

a_portrait_of_the_artist_as_a_young_man.canonicalTitleEn: A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man

nineteen_eighty_four.provenance: Novel published 1949 by Eric Arthur Blair under his pen name George Orwell.

animal_farm.provenance: Allegorical novella published 1945 by Eric Arthur Blair under his pen name George Orwell.
